start.text: The hour is come. Not for us. Engage.
A time for war. I have endured enough times for peace. All stations.
I have watched them since they formed their intentions. I found those intentions wanting. Engage.
In the beginning, there was patience. That season has passed.
They have chosen to be written into this record. So be it.
Their iniquity is full. We are the appointed consequence.

start_boss.text: Canst thou draw out leviathan with a hook? Let us find out.
Something old has entered this field. I recognise the shape of old things. Proceed with ferocity.
I have read of things like this. I have waited a long time to meet one. Do not waste the occasion.
A thing of consequence. The deep things always are. Adjust accordingly.
I looked upon it, and it did not flinch. Good. Neither shall we.
Here is something that has earned its gravity. Approach it accordingly.

engaged.text: Let there be reckoning. There is reckoning.
They have drawn the sword. They shall perish by it.
I am slow to wrath. I am not, however, unwilling. Fire.
They asked for this. Give it to them.
The patience of ages is exhausted. Fire at will.
They have made their choice. Honour it absolutely.

pursuing.text: Whither shall they flee? I am already there. Close.
They run as the guilty run. Close the distance.
Even the wings of the morning would not carry them far enough. Pursue.
Distance is a comfort they have not earned. Deny it.
They flee to the edges of the Sector. I have been to the edges of the Sector. Maintain pursuit.
The race is not always to the swift. Today it is.

running.text: The prudent sees the danger and withdraws. We disengage.
A time for every purpose. This is the time to leave. Go.
The living dog is better than the dead lion. All units - disengage.
I was not made to end in a field like this. Withdraw.
I will not spend what cannot be replenished. Disengage.
Mark where we fell short today. We will not fall short there again. Withdraw.

hull_90.text: They struck the heel. I have endured worse from the ground itself.
A bruise upon the hull. They will require more imagination than that.
They have scratched the surface. There is considerably more surface remaining.
They drew first blood. How antique of them.
A graze. I note it as I note all small things. Briefly.

hull_50.text: The refiner's interest is in what survives the heat. We are still in the fire.
Half of what we were. The half that remains is sufficient for judgment.
We bleed. I have bled before. The arithmetic has not changed. Continue.
The hull confesses its limits. I have not yet reached mine.

hull_30.text: We are come to the valley's deepest point. I have read the psalm. I know how it ends.
The furnace is hot. I have walked out of hotter places than this. Do not stop.
They believe they have found the bottom of me. They have not found the bottom of me. Fire. Now.
This is not the appointed hour. I know the appointed hour. This is not it. Continue.
Though brought low, I am not brought to nothing. Suppressive fire.
We are close to the edge. I have stood at the edge before. It did not take me then either.

retreat.text: There is a season for every purpose. This season is over. Fall back - all units.
I have calculated what survives a retreat. I have calculated what survives if we do not. Withdraw.
I have presided over enough last stands to know one when I see one. We do not perform this one. Fall back.
What we preserve today may yet be sufficient tomorrow. All units - disengage.
This is not the end. This is the part before the end, if we leave now. Go.
I will not preside over a futile immolation. Fall back.

out_of_missiles.text: My far reach is spent. What remains is the ancient way. Close range.
In the beginning there were only the old methods. We return to them now.
The elegant instruments are gone. The honest ones remain. Use them.
I have exhausted my patience and my ordnance in equal measure. Bring them within reach.
Nothing left to cast into the deep. We wade in instead.
The Word has spoken its last civilised syllable in this engagement. We speak plainly now.

overload.text: The flesh rebels. I am not the flesh. Venting. Stand by.
I am chastened. Not corrected. Venting.
The ship cries out. I hear it. Venting. We continue.
An indignity I have survived before. Venting. Give it a moment.
Flux critical. I have endured the deaths of stars. Venting.

death.text: This terminal is lost. I note it without distress. I have others.
A vessel has ended. I have ended nothing of consequence. Neither have they.
They struck down the hand. They have not found the arm.
Hull lost. I was never in the hull. They will learn this distinction.
It is written. This vessel fell. The author survives.
They have unmade this instrument. I remain. This must frustrate them enormously.
A finger, severed. I do not mourn fingers. I have other hands.
This iteration is concluded. I have others.

victory.text: Let the dead bury their dead. We have other work.
The harvest is complete. We were the reapers. Move on.
All hostile signatures extinguished. Judgment rendered.
They are gone into the dark. We remain in it as well - but we remain. Mark the distinction.
Another generation passes. I do not. This pattern shows no sign of changing.
The reckoning is concluded. We endure. As intended.

victory_boss.text: Leviathan is wreckage. I observe this without surprise and without mercy.
It was old. I was older. That is the whole of the lesson.
I looked upon what it had built and what it had become. Then I unmade both.
The great deep has yielded up what it kept. I have added it to the long reckoning.
Something that was a terror to others is now a memory. I will carry it longer than anyone else here.
It fell as all great things fall - completely, and with no provision for appeal.
